zh.lifeSummary: 當Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan於1175年1月1日出生在威爾士卡迪甘史爾時，她的父親Gilbert de Andea31歲，母親Isolda de Cardigan23歲。她於大約1207年與Oliver de Champernon在英國戴文布洛阿可利斯特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1238年在英國英格蘭戴文可利斯特 聖 喬治享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan于1175年1月1日出生在威尔士卡迪甘史爾时，她的父亲Gilbert de Andea31岁，母亲Isolda de Cardigan23岁。她于大约1207年与Oliver de Champernon在英国戴文布洛阿可利斯特结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1238年在英国英格兰戴文可利斯特 聖 喬治享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Cardigan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (Tipperary, Leitrim and Cavan): variant of   Corrigan  .

variants.name: Corrigan
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Malachy, Brendan, Dermot, Bridgid, Brigid, Cait, Niall, Patrick Michael.
Irish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Corragáin ‘descendant of Corragán’, a double diminutive of corr ‘pointed’.

nameMeanings.name: Eva
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Popular Latinate form of   Eve  , used also as an Anglicization of the Irish name Aoife .

nameMeanings.name: Andea
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Of disputed origin. It has been in use since the 17th century. It is now generally taken as a feminine equivalent of Andreas , and this probably represents its actual origin. However, it was not in use in the Middle Ages, and the suggestion has also been made that it represents a coinage in English from the Greek vocabulary word andreia ‘manliness, virility’.

en.lifeSummary: When Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan was born on 1 January 1175, in Cardiganshire, Wales, her father, Gilbert de Andea, was 31 and her mother, Isolda de Cardigan, was 23. She married Oliver de Champernon about 1207, in Broadclyst, Devon, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 3 daughters. She died in 1238, in Clyst St George, Devon, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.Clyst Champernon, Devonshire, England: Clyst St George, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan est née le 1 janvier 1175, à Cardiganshire, Galles, son père, Gilbert de Andea, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Isolda de Cardigan, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Oliver de Champernon environ 1207, à Broadclyst, Devon, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée en 1238, à Clyst St George, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.Clyst Champernon, Devonshire, England: Clyst St George, Devon, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan am 1. Januar 1175 in Cardiganshire, Wales geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Gilbert de Andea 31 und ihre Mutter Isolda de Cardigan 23. Sie hat um 1207 in Broadclyst, Devon, England Oliver de Champernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 3 Töchter. Sie starb 1238 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Clyst St George, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan è nata il il 1 gennaio 1175 nel Cardiganshire, Galles, sua padre, Gilbert de Andea, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Isolda de Cardigan, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Oliver de Champernon circa 1207, nel Broadclyst, Devon, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1238, nel Clyst St George, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardiganが1175年1月1日にウェールズカーディガンシュアイアで生まれた時，父Gilbert de Andeaは31歳，母Isolda de Cardiganは23歳であった。約1207年にイギリスデボンブロアドクリストでOliver de Champernonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1238年にイギリスイギリスデボンクリスト スト ジョーッジで63歳で死去した。

ko.Clyst Champernon, Devonshire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 클리스트 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan(이)가 1175년 1월 1일 웨일스 카디건실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Gilbert de Andea(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Isolda de Cardigan(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 대략 1207년 영국 데폰 브로드클리스트에서 Oliver de Champernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1238년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 클리스트 스트 조지에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan nasceu em 1 de janeiro de 1175, em Cardiganshire, Gales, seu pai, Gilbert de Andea, tinha 31 anos e sua mãe, Isolda de Cardigan, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Oliver de Champernon aproximadamente 1207, em Broadclyst, Devon, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1238, em Clyst St George, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 63 anos.

ru.Clyst Champernon, Devonshire, England: клист ст джеордж, девон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Eva Andea Wymarca de Cardigan родилась 1 января 1175 г. в местности кардиганьшир, Уэльс, её отцу по имени Gilbert de Andea было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Isolda de Cardigan, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Oliver de Champernon около 1207 г. в местности броадклист, девон, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 3 дочери. Она умерла в 1238 г. в местности клист ст джеордж, девон, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.

Se casó con Oliver de Champernon aproximadamente 1207, en Broadclyst, Devon, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 3 hijas. Murió en 1238, en Clyst St George, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 63 años.
